item.title: iPhone 18 Pro 或迎最强相机升级：更大的长焦光圈、新增「Siri 模式」
item.guid: iPhone-18-Pro-或迎最强相机升级：更大的长焦光圈、新增「Siri-模式」
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, the iPhone 18 Pro series, expected to be released this fall, is anticipated to receive the biggest camera hardware upgrade in the product line's history. Reporter Mark Gurman cited leaks indicating that the iPhone 18 Pro's main camera is expected to feature variable aperture technology, and the telephoto lens will also adopt a larger aperture. 据彭博社报道，今年秋季发布的 iPhone 18 Pro 系列预计将迎来该产品线上有史以来最大的相机硬件升级。记者 Mark Gurman 援引爆料指出，iPhone 18 Pro 的主摄预计将配备可变光圈技术，长焦镜头也将采用更大的光圈。

Apple also plans to add a "Siri" mode to the Camera App in the upcoming iOS 27, replacing the existing independent visual intelligence interface and placing it alongside traditional photo and video options. 苹果还计划在即将推出的 iOS 27 中为相机 App 加入「Siri」模式，取代现有的视觉智能独立界面，与传统的拍照和录像选项并列。

In this mode, users can invoke services like ChatGPT to ask questions about content in the frame, or use Google for image circle search. Notably, the report also states that Apple will redesign the shutter button for Siri mode to match the Apple Intelligence style. 在该模式下，用户可调用 ChatGPT 等服务对画面中的内容进行提问，或使用 Google 进行图像圈搜。值得注意的是，报道还称苹果将为 Siri 模式重新设计快门按钮，以适配 Apple Intelligence 风格。

Gurman believes that the combination of these camera and AI software and hardware will pave the way for a series of Siri-based wearable devices that Apple plans to launch next (including new AirPods, smart glasses, and pendants). Gurman 认为，这些相机与 AI 软硬件的结合，将为苹果接下来计划推出的一系列基于 Siri 的可穿戴设备（包括新款 AirPods、智能眼镜和吊坠）铺平道路。

item.title: DeepSeek 论文发了又删，「给 AI 装上手指」的视觉推理方案提前曝光
item.guid: DeepSeek-论文发了又删，「给-AI-装上手指」的视觉推理方案提前曝光
item.description:
Last night, DeepSeek published a new multimodal inference paper, "Thinking with Visual Primitives," but within hours, the related tweet and GitHub page were deleted. APPSO had read the entire paper beforehand. 昨晚，DeepSeek 发布多模态推理新论文《Thinking with Visual Primitives》，但数小时后相关推文与 GitHub 页面均被删除，APPSO 在此前读完了整篇论文。

🔗 Related Reading: What exactly did DeepSeek's new paper, deleted overnight, say? 🔗 相关阅读： DeepSeek连夜删掉的新论文，到底说了什么

The paper points out that current large multimodal models have a "Reference Gap" in visual reasoning – the model sees the image clearly but cannot precisely point to specific objects within it during the reasoning process. 论文指出，当前多模态大模型在视觉推理上存在「引用鸿沟」（Reference Gap）—— 模型看清了图像，却无法在推理过程中精确指向其中的具体对象。

DeepSeek's solution is to have the model directly output image coordinates (bounding boxes or coordinate points) in its chain of thought, embedding the act of "pointing" into the reasoning process itself, rather than just as a final answer. Researchers liken this to the human cognitive process of "thinking while pointing." DeepSeek 的解法是让模型在思考链中直接输出图像坐标（边界框或坐标点），将「指」这一动作嵌入推理过程本身，而非仅作为最终答案输出，研究者将其类比为人类「边指边想」的认知方式。

In terms of efficiency, an image of the same size requires approximately 1100 tokens for Gemini-3-Flash, about 870 for Claude-Sonnet-4.6, and about 740 for GPT-5.4. DeepSeek uses only 90 information units, with all freed up computational power dedicated to coordinate annotation during inference. 在效率上，同等尺寸图像 Gemini-3-Flash 需消耗约 1100 个 token，Claude-Sonnet-4.6 约 870 个，GPT-5.4 约 740 个，DeepSeek 仅用 90 个信息单元，腾出的算力全部用于推理中的坐标标注。

In the "Maze Navigation" benchmark test, DeepSeek leads with a 66.9% accuracy rate. For reference, GPT-5.4 achieved 50.6%, Gemini-3-Flash 49.4%, and Claude-Sonnet-4.6 48.9% (the random guess accuracy for this task is 50%, meaning the latter three are close to random levels); 在「迷宫导航」基准测试中，DeepSeek 以 66.9% 的正确率领跑，作为参考，GPT-5.4 50.6%，Gemini-3-Flash 49.4%，Claude-Sonnet-4.6 48.9%（该任务随机猜测正确率为 50%，后三者接近随机水平）；

The paper also acknowledges existing limitations: coordinate precision is still insufficient in fine-grained scenarios (directly reflected in cases like "counting fingers" failures); the visual primitive mode requires specific trigger words to activate, and the model cannot yet autonomously determine when to use it; topological reasoning has limited generalization ability outside the training distribution. 论文也坦承了现有局限：精细场景下坐标精度仍不足（数手指翻车即为直接体现）；视觉原语模式需特定触发词激活，模型尚不能自主判断何时使用；拓扑推理在训练分布外的泛化能力有限。

item.title: 苹果毛利率创历史新高、内存成本压力将「显著加大」
item.guid: 苹果毛利率创历史新高、内存成本压力将「显著加大」
item.description:
On April 30, local time, Apple released its second fiscal quarter 2026 results (ending in March), with revenue of $111.18 billion, a 17% year-over-year increase, and EPS of $2.01, both exceeding Wall Street expectations. Performance across business segments is as follows: 当地时间 4 月 30 日，苹果发布 2026 财年第二财季（截至 3 月）业绩，营收 1111.8 亿美元，同比增长 17%，EPS 2.01 美元，均超华尔街预期。各业务板块表现如下：

    iPhone revenue was $56.99 billion, up 22% year-over-year, slightly below LSEG analysts' expectations of $57.21 billion;

    Services revenue was $30.98 billion, up approximately 16% year-over-year, exceeding expectations of $30.39 billion;

    Mac revenue was $8.4 billion, exceeding expectations of $8.02 billion;

    iPad revenue was $6.91 billion, exceeding expectations of $6.66 billion;

    Wearables, Home, and Accessories revenue was $7.9 billion, exceeding expectations of $7.7 billion;

    Gross margin reached 49.3%, higher than the previous quarter's 48.2%, and also exceeded expectations of 48.4%.

Two highlights worth noting this quarter: 本季度最值得关注的两个亮点：

    Greater China revenue reached $20.5 billion, a significant year-on-year increase of 28%, resuming strong growth momentum;

    Services business continues to boost overall profit margins, with gross margin rising for several consecutive quarters, reaching a new historical high of 49.3%; R&D expenditure increased by 33% year-on-year to $11.42 billion.

Looking ahead to this fiscal quarter (June quarter), Apple expects revenue to grow by 14%-17% year-on-year, significantly exceeding analysts' previous forecast of 9.5% growth. CFO Kevan Parekh pointed out that due to memory shortages driven by global AI demand, memory cost pressure will "significantly increase" next quarter , and the company will "evaluate various countermeasures" accordingly. 展望本财季（6 月季度），苹果预计营收同比增长 14%-17%，大幅超越分析师此前预期的 9.5% 增速。CFO Kevan Parekh 指出，受全球 AI 需求驱动的内存短缺影响， 下季度内存成本压力将「显著加大」 ，公司将就此「评估多种应对方案」。

item.title: 三星 Q1 芯片利润暴涨 49 倍，单部门吃掉全集团 94% 营业利润
item.guid: 三星-Q1-芯片利润暴涨-49-倍，单部门吃掉全集团-94%-营业利润
item.description:
According to Reuters and CNBC, Samsung Electronics achieved revenue of 133.9 trillion Korean Won (approximately $90 billion) in Q1 this year, a year-on-year increase of approximately 69%; operating profit reached 57.2 trillion Korean Won, a year-on-year increase of approximately 8.5 times, setting a new historical high and exceeding analysts' expectations of 55.28 trillion Korean Won. 据路透社、CNBC 报道，三星电子今年 Q1 实现营收 133.9 万亿韩元（约 900 亿美元），同比增长约 69%；营业利润 57.2 万亿韩元，同比增长约 8.5 倍，创历史新高，超出分析师预期的 55.28 万亿韩元。

The DS (Device Solutions, including memory chips and foundry) division's Q1 revenue was 81.7 trillion Korean Won, a significant year-on-year increase of 225%; operating profit was 53.7 trillion Korean Won, compared to only about 1.1 trillion Korean Won in the same period last year, an increase of approximately 49 times, accounting for 94% of the group's total operating profit , almost squeezing out the profit margins of other divisions. DS（Device Solutions，含存储芯片及晶圆代工）部门 Q1 营收 81.7 万亿韩元，同比大增 225%；营业利润 53.7 万亿韩元，去年同期仅约 1.1 万亿韩元，增幅约 49 倍， 占集团整体营业利润的 94% ，几乎榨干其他部门的利润空间。

In contrast, during the same period last year, the MX (Mobile eXperience, including mobile phones and networks) division alone supported 64% of the group's profit with 4.3 trillion Korean Won, while the DS division accounted for only 16%. In Q1 this year, the MX division's operating profit plummeted to 2.8 trillion Korean Won, a year-on-year decrease of 35%; the display division's operating profit also fell by 20% to 400 billion Korean Won. 反观去年同期，MX（手机及网络）部门以 4.3 万亿韩元独撑集团利润的 64%，DS 部门占比仅 16%。今年 Q1，MX 部门营业利润骤降至 2.8 万亿韩元，同比下滑 35%；显示屏部门营业利润亦下跌 20% 至 4000 亿韩元。

The boom in AI data center construction is the core driving force this quarter. Samsung stated frankly in its earnings call that "demand fulfillment rate has fallen to a historical low," and customers are locking in next year's orders in advance due to concerns about supply shortages, with the supply-demand gap expected to widen further next year. AI 数据中心建设热潮是本季核心驱动力。三星在财报电话会上直言「需求 满足率 已跌至历史最低」，客户因担忧供货短缺而提前锁定明年订单，供需缺口预计在明年进一步拉大。

Samsung also disclosed that it had achieved mass production of HBM4 chips in February this year and shipped them to Nvidia's Vera Rubin platform. This year's HBM revenue target is to more than triple year-on-year, as it accelerates its efforts to catch up with SK Hynix's leading position in the HBM market. 三星同时披露，今年 2 月已率先实现 HBM4 芯片量产并向英伟达 Vera Rubin 平台出货，今年 HBM 营收目标为同比增长逾三倍，正加速追赶 SK 海力士在 HBM 市场的领先地位。

🔗 Related reading: Samsung memory is impartial, Samsung phones are forced to lose money 🔗 相关阅读： 三星内存铁面无私，三星手机被迫亏损

item.title: 追觅 CEO 俞浩回应要求全员开社媒：是为培养「复合能力」，AI 时代单一能力将被取代
item.guid: 追觅-CEO-俞浩回应要求全员开社媒：是为培养「复合能力」，AI-时代单一能力将被取代
item.description:
Yesterday, Yu Hao, founder and CEO of Dreame Technology, posted on Weibo, requiring "every Dreame employee to open social media accounts on all platforms," and to spend 15 minutes daily publishing 3 videos introducing products, technologies under development, or the company's product selling points and core innovations. 昨天，追觅科技创始人兼 CEO 俞浩在微博发文，要求「每一个追觅员工，都开通所有平台的社交媒体账号」，每天用 15 分钟发布 3 条视频，介绍正在研发的产品、技术或公司产品卖点与核心创新。

He also disclosed the reward mechanism: 10,000 yuan for 10,000 real followers, 50,000 yuan for 50,000 followers, and 100,000 yuan for 100,000 followers. Yu Hao stated that Dreame employees themselves should have at least 20,000 accounts. 他同时披露奖励机制：真实粉丝达 1 万人奖励 1 万元，达 5 万人奖励 5 万元，达 10 万人奖励 10 万元。俞浩表示，光追觅员工自身，就要有至少两万多个账号。

On the evening of the same day, Yu Hao again published a lengthy article responding to external doubts, characterizing this requirement as a measure to cultivate employees' "composite capabilities." 同日晚间，俞浩再度发长文回应外界质疑，将这一要求定性为培养员工「复合能力」的举措。

Engineers are naturally good at dealing with complex parameters and solving thousands of technical problems, but they are not good at communicating with people or expressing things clearly and simply! The goal is to train everyone to speak in plain language, to explain their products and technologies clearly using easy-to-understand terms!

He also clarified that people with hundreds of thousands of followers joining Dreame cannot directly receive corresponding rewards, as "that is still a single capability"; only by mastering both technical and communication skills will they meet the "composite capability" standard, and then receive corresponding incentives. 他同时澄清，已有几十万粉丝的人加入追觅并不能直接获得对应奖励，「那还是单一能力」；只有同时掌握技术能力与传播能力，才符合「复合能力」标准，届时才会给予相应激励。

Yu Hao also stated that in the AI era, single capabilities are easily replaced, and only those with composite capabilities can "master AI, manage complex systems, and lead larger teams." 俞浩还表示，在 AI 时代，单一能力极易被取代，只有掌握复合能力的人才能「驾驭 AI、驾驭复杂系统、统领更大的团队」。

item.title: 赛力斯一季度卖出 78500 辆新能源车，研发费用同比增长 70.7%
item.guid: 赛力斯一季度卖出-78500-辆新能源车，研发费用同比增长-70.7%
item.description:
Yesterday, Seres Group disclosed its Q1 2026 report, achieving revenue of 25.75 billion yuan in the first quarter of this year, a year-on-year increase of 34.5%; net profit attributable to shareholders of listed companies was 750 million yuan, a slight year-on-year increase of 0.9%; total profit was 850 million yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 4.8%, with new energy vehicle sales reaching 78,500 units. 昨天，赛力斯集团披露 2026 年第一季度报告，今年一季度实现营收 257.5 亿元，同比增长 34.5%；归属于上市公司股东的净利润为 7.5 亿元，同比微增 0.9%；利润总额为 8.5 亿元，同比下降 4.8%，新能源汽车销量 78500 辆。

    Operating cost was 18.99 billion yuan, with a corresponding gross profit margin of approximately 26.2%, slightly narrower than the same period last year;

    R&D expenses were 1.79 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 70.7%, an increase of approximately 740 million yuan compared to the same period last year;

    Sales expenses were 3.72 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 39.7%;

    Financial expenses turned from a net income of 140 million yuan in the same period last year to a net expenditure of 95.81 million yuan.

It is worth noting that the net profit attributable to the parent company after deducting non-recurring gains and losses was only 103 million yuan, a sharp year-on-year decrease of 73.9%, showing a significant difference from the GAAP net profit attributable to the parent company of 750 million yuan. The difference mainly came from 630 million yuan in non-recurring gains and losses this quarter, of which government subsidies contributed 630 million yuan. 值得关注的是，扣除非经常性损益后归母净利润仅为 1.03 亿元，同比大幅下滑 73.9%，与 GAAP 口径归母净利润 7.5 亿元之间存在显著差异。差异主要来源于本季度 6.3 亿元的非经常性损益，其中政府补助贡献 6.3 亿元。

item.title: 小红书设立 AI 一级部门
item.guid: 小红书设立-AI-一级部门
item.description:
According to Cailian Press, Xiaohongshu announced a new round of organizational upgrades yesterday via an internal all-staff letter. Conan (real name Ding Ling) has been promoted to president, overseeing the three core businesses of community, e-commerce, and commercialization, as well as the technology system, reporting directly to CEO Xingya (Mao Wenchao). 据财联社报道，小红书昨日通过全员内部信官宣新一轮组织升级，柯南（本名丁玲）升任总裁，统管社区、电商、商业化三大核心业务及技术体系，直接向 CEO 星矢（毛文超）汇报。

AI is the core keyword of this adjustment. Xiaohongshu has established a first-level AI department, Dots , which reports directly to Conan, aiming to build a full-link technology system from model research and development, infrastructure to product application; simultaneously, the Enterprise Intelligence Department was established, integrating the original Enterprise Efficiency Department and Data Science Department. AI 是本次调整的核心关键词。 小红书成立 AI 一级部门 Dots ，直接向柯南汇报，定位为构建从模型研发、基础设施到产品应用的全链路技术体系；同步成立企业智能部，整合原企业效率部与数据科学部。

Regarding internationalization, Xiaohongshu has officially established the overseas business department Rednote, reporting directly to the CEO; the cross-border e-commerce platform Redshop is expected to launch in June this year. In addition, the innovation incubation department Lab1327 was also established, led by Sakuragi, the head of product design. 国际化方面，小红书正式成立海外业务部门 Rednote，直接向 CEO 汇报；跨境电商平台 Redshop 预计今年 6 月上线。此外，创新孵化部门 Lab1327 同步设立，由产品设计负责人樱木牵头。

item.title: D 加密反制破解出新招，正版玩家被迫每 14 天联网「打卡」
item.guid: D-加密反制破解出新招，正版玩家被迫每-14-天联网「打卡」
item.description:
Recently, to combat cracking, Denuvo (D encryption) and 2K Games jointly implemented stricter licensing restrictions on several of their games, sparking a strong backlash in the player community. 近期，为应对破解，Denuvo（D 加密）与 2K Games 联合对旗下多款游戏实施了更严格的授权限制，在玩家社群中引发强烈反弹。

Affected games include "NBA 2K25," "NBA 2K26," and "Marvel's Midnight Suns." These games now use offline authorization tokens with a fixed validity period, which will automatically expire after approximately 14 days. 受影响的游戏包括《NBA 2K25》《NBA 2K26》及《漫威暗夜之子》。这些游戏现已启用固定有效期的离线授权令牌，令牌将在约 14 天后自动失效。

Regardless of whether players change hardware or reinstall the system, once the token expires, the game will be unable to launch directly, and an internet connection will be required to re-obtain authorization to continue playing. 无论玩家是否更换硬件或重装系统，一旦令牌到期，游戏将直接无法启动，必须联网重新获取授权才能继续游玩。

Earlier this year, cracking groups MKDev and DenuvOwO developed a Hypervisor-based bypass solution (HVB), which, by installing kernel-level drivers to intercept and simulate Denuvo's verification requests, led to almost all Denuvo-protected single-player games being cracked or bypassed. 今年早些时候，破解组织 MKDev 和 DenuvOwO 开发出基于 Hypervisor 的绕过方案（HVB），通过安装内核级驱动拦截并模拟 Denuvo 的验证请求，使得几乎所有受 Denuvo 保护的单机游戏均遭到破解或绕过。

item.title: 奥特曼：Codex 将成为我与电脑交互的主要方式
item.guid: 奥特曼：Codex-将成为我与电脑交互的主要方式
item.description:
Recently, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman stated at Stripe's annual developer conference that Codex is experiencing "explosive growth" and frankly said that this AI programming tool will become his primary way of interacting with computers. 日前，OpenAI CEO Sam Altman 在 Stripe 年度开发者大会上表示，Codex 正迎来「爆发式增长」，并直言这款 AI 编程工具将成为他与电脑交互的主要方式。

He attributed this surge to the overall leap in model reasoning capabilities, the closed-loop user feedback in coding scenarios, and the combined effect of data accumulation, adding that "once you know something is possible, it's easier to go all in." 他将这波爆发归因于模型推理能力的整体跃升、代码场景的用户反馈闭环，以及数据积累的共同作用，并补充说「一旦你知道某件事是可能的，就更容易全力去做」。

Currently, Codex's core users are still primarily programmers, but Altman revealed that the depth of use in non-programming scenarios has exceeded expectations . 目前 Codex 的核心用户仍以编程为主，但 Altman 透露， 非编程场景的使用深度已超出预期 。

OpenAI's goal is for Codex to go beyond programming and cover "all the work you do in front of a computer." Altman admitted that the non-programming part is "probably only 10% complete" currently, but with real users pouring in, he expects it to "catch up quickly." OpenAI 的目标，是让 Codex 不止于编程，而是覆盖「你在电脑前所做的所有工作」。Altman 坦言目前非编程部分「大概只完成了 10%」，但随着真实用户涌入，他预计会「很快追上」。

Underpinning all of this is OpenAI's increasingly aggressive approach to model training. Altman was previously pressed in a podcast with Nicholas Thompson, CEO of The Atlantic: Has OpenAI ever run models trained entirely on synthetic data? 支撑这一切的，是 OpenAI 在模型训练上愈发激进的路线。Altman 早前在《大西洋月刊》CEO Nicholas Thompson 的播客中被追问：OpenAI 有没有跑过完全用合成数据训练的模型？

He paused and said, "I'm not sure if I should say it" — a statement that was almost an admission itself. He then explained that the core capability of models is reasoning, and reasoning can be entirely learned from purely synthetic data . 他停顿了一下，说「我不确定该不该说」—— 这句话本身已近乎默认。他随即解释，模型的核心能力是推理， 而推理完全可以用纯合成数据习得 。

He used mathematics as an example: Can a model that has never seen human data calculate better than humans? "I think so." But understanding human values is different: "A model that hasn't been exposed to human culture is unlikely to be able to do that." 他以数学为例：一个从未见过人类数据的模型，能不能比人类算得更好？「我觉得可以。」但理解人类价值观则不同，「一个没接触过人类文化的模型大概率做不到」。

Thompson also previously mentioned that GPT-4 was "the last model that didn't really use AI data," and Altman agreed with this. Thompson 此前也提到，GPT-4 是「最后一个没怎么用 AI 数据的模型」，Altman 对此表示认同。

item.title: 模型爱说「哥布林」，OpenAI 花了数月才找到根源
item.guid: 模型爱说「哥布林」，OpenAI-花了数月才找到根源
item.description:
Yesterday, OpenAI published an article reviewing the "goblin" problem that has plagued multiple generations of GPT models — starting from GPT-5.1, the models increasingly used fantasy creatures like goblins and gremlins as metaphors in their responses. 昨天，OpenAI 发文复盘了困扰 GPT 系列多代模型的「哥布林」问题 —— 从 GPT-5.1 起，模型在回答中越来越频繁地使用哥布林、小妖精等奇幻生物作为比喻。

Data shows that after GPT-5.1 went live, the frequency of the word "goblin" in ChatGPT conversations increased by 175%, and "gremlin" by 52%. By the GPT-5.4 stage, the problem had fully erupted. 数据显示，GPT-5.1 上线后，ChatGPT 对话中「goblin」一词的出现频率上升了 175%，「gremlin」上升了 52%。到 GPT-5.4 阶段，问题彻底爆发。

The article points out that this issue is related to ChatGPT's "Nerdy" personality customization feature. The system prompt for this persona requires the model to "dissolve seriousness with linguistic playfulness" and "acknowledge the weirdness of the world and enjoy it." 文章指出，该问题与 ChatGPT 的「书呆子」（Nerdy）人格定制功能有关。这一人格的系统提示词要求模型「用语言的趣味性消解一本正经」、「承认世界的怪异并享受它」。

During training, reward signals used to reinforce this personality style consistently gave higher scores to outputs containing fantasy creature vocabulary, a bias observed in 76.2% of datasets. The "nerd" personality accounts for only 2.5% of all ChatGPT responses but contributes 66.7% of "goblin" mentions. 训练时，用于强化该人格风格的奖励信号对含有奇幻生物词汇的输出持续打出更高分，在 76.2% 的数据集中均可观察到这一偏向。「书呆子」人格仅占 ChatGPT 全部回复的 2.5%，却贡献了 66.7% 的「哥布林」提及量。

Currently, OpenAI has taken this personality offline, removed related reward signals, filtered training data, and stated that a new set of model behavior auditing tools has been implemented. 目前，OpenAI 已下线该人格、移除相关奖励信号并过滤训练数据，并表示一套新的模型行为审计工具已经落地。

🔗 Related Reading: Who stuffed a bunch of "monsters" into GPT-5.5's brain? 🔗 相关阅读： 谁在 GPT-5.5 脑子里塞了一群「妖怪」？

item.title: 俞敏洪回应东方甄选 180 万股争议：「硬给我的」，兑现后全部捐出
item.guid: 俞敏洪回应东方甄选-180-万股争议：「硬给我的」，兑现后全部捐出
item.description:
According to Bianews, Dongfang Zhenxuan recently announced that, under its 2023 share incentive plan, it has granted 19.3014 million shares as rewards to 302 directors, executives, and core employees, accounting for 1.82% of the issued shares. The closing price on the grant date was HKD 28.44 per share. 据鞭牛士报道，东方甄选日前发布公告，依据 2023 年股份激励计划，向公司董事、高管及核心员工授出 1930.14 万股股份奖励，涉及 302 人，占已发行股份 1.82%，授予当日收盘价为 28.44 港元/股。

Among them, Yu Minhong, Executive Director, Chairman, and CEO, was granted 1.8 million shares, accounting for 0.17% ; Yin Qiang, Executive Director and CFO, was granted 450,000 shares, accounting for 0.04%; the remaining 300 employees were collectively granted 17.0514 million shares, accounting for 1.61%. 其中， 执行董事、主席兼CEO 俞敏洪获授 180 万股，占比 0.17% ；执行董事、CFO 尹强获授 45 万股，占比 0.04%；其余 300 名员工合计获授 1705.14 万股，占比 1.61%。

This share grant immediately sparked external doubts, with public opinion focusing on the idea of "giving oneself a reward." Yesterday, Yu Minhong responded by posting on his personal social media platform. 此次授股随即引发外界质疑，舆论焦点集中于「自己给自己发奖励」一说。昨天，俞敏洪在个人社交平台发文作出回应。

Yu Minhong revealed that he initially explicitly refused and has never received any salary since the establishment of Dongfang Zhenxuan. However, the board, representing the shareholders, believed that without equity incentives, his efforts and returns would be "unequal," ultimately persuading him to accept the grant. 俞敏洪透露，自己最初曾明确拒绝，且自东方甄选成立至今从未领取过任何工资。但董事会代表股东方面认为，若无股权激励，其付出与回报「不对等」，最终说服其接受授予。

Yu Minhong also pledged that after the equity is realized and tax obligations are fulfilled, all cash proceeds will be used in three directions: establishing a chairman's reward fund to reward employees who have made outstanding contributions to Dongfang Zhenxuan; donating to the New Oriental Foundation, entirely for supporting rural primary and secondary school students; and donating a portion to Peking University to help students from rural areas. 俞敏洪同时承诺，待股权兑现并完成纳税义务后，全部现金收益将用于三个方向：设立董事长奖励基金，用于奖励为东方甄选做出杰出贡献的员工；捐赠至新东方基金会，全部用于支持农村中小学生；捐献一部分给北京大学，帮助来自农村的北大学生。

item.title: 高通二季度营收 106 亿美元，汽车芯片创历史新高
item.guid: 高通二季度营收-106-亿美元，汽车芯片创历史新高
item.description:
Yesterday, Qualcomm released its second fiscal quarter (ending March 29) results: 昨天，高通发布今年第二财季（截至 3 月 29 日）业绩：

Revenue for the quarter was $10.6 billion, down 3% year-over-year; GAAP net income was $7.37 billion, a significant increase of 162% year-over-year, primarily driven by a one-time tax benefit; Non-GAAP diluted earnings per share were $2.65, down 7% year-over-year.

    Semiconductor business (QCT) revenue was $9.076 billion, down 4% year-over-year, with pre-tax profit margin narrowing to 27% (30% in the same period last year);

    Handset chip revenue was $6.024 billion, down 13% year-over-year, dragged by tight memory supply and weak demand from some handset OEMs;

    Automotive chip revenue was $1.326 billion, up 38% year-over-year, setting a new single-quarter record ;

    IoT revenue was $1.726 billion, up 9% year-over-year;

    Licensing business (QTL) revenue was $1.382 billion, up 5% year-over-year, with pre-tax profit margin rising to 72%.

Qualcomm expects third fiscal quarter revenue to be in the range of $9.2 billion to $10 billion, with Non-GAAP diluted earnings per share guidance of $2.10 to $2.30. Memory supply constraints and related price pressures will continue to affect demand from some handset OEMs. QCT handset revenue from Chinese customers is expected to bottom out in the third fiscal quarter, followed by a sequential recovery. 高通预计第三财季营收区间为 92～100 亿美元，Non-GAAP 摊薄每股收益指引为 2.10～2.30 美元；存储供应约束及相关价格压力将继续影响部分手机 OEM 的需求，预计来自中国客户的 QCT 手机营收将在第三财季触底，此后恢复环比增长。

item.title: 特斯拉纯电半挂首台量产车下线
item.guid: 特斯拉纯电半挂首台量产车下线
item.description:
Yesterday, Tesla officially announced that the first production unit of its "all-electric semi-trailer truck" Semi has officially rolled off the dedicated high-volume production line at the Gigafactory Nevada. 昨天，特斯拉官方正式宣布，旗下「纯电半挂式重卡」Semi 的首台量产车已正式从内华达超级工厂的专属高产能产线下线。

According to the final production specifications announced in February this year, the model offers two versions: a standard range version with 325 miles of range at a gross vehicle weight of 82,000 pounds (priced at approximately $260,000), and a long-range version with 500 miles of range (priced at approximately $290,000), making it the lowest-priced Class 8 all-electric tractor on the market. 根据今年 2 月公布的最终量产规格，该车型提供两个版本：满载 8.2 万磅总重下续航 325 英里的标准续航版（售价约 26 万美元），以及续航 500 英里的长续航版（售价约 29 万美元），成为目前市场上标价最低的 Class 8 级别纯电牵引车。

In terms of core technical parameters, both models are equipped with an 800 kW tri-motor powertrain, delivering a maximum power of 1072 horsepower, and support 1.2 MW Megacharger fast charging, which can restore 60% of the range within approximately 30 minutes of statutory rest time. 在核心技术参数上，两款车型均搭载 800 千瓦三电机动力总成，最大功率达 1072 马力，并支持 1.2 兆瓦的 Megacharger 快充，可在约 30 分钟的法定休息时间内恢复 60% 的续航里程。

Furthermore, the Nevada factory has achieved a high degree of vertical integration, with the accompanying 4680 battery cells manufactured within the same facility, directly eliminating the supply chain bottlenecks that previously limited Semi production capacity. 此外，内华达工厂实现了高度垂直整合，配套的 4680 电池电芯在同一厂区内制造，直接消除了前期限制 Semi 产能的供应链瓶颈。

item.title: OpenAI 联合创始人：软件 3.0 时代，Prompt 就是新的代码
item.guid: OpenAI-联合创始人：软件-3.0-时代，Prompt-就是新的代码
item.description:
Recently, AI researcher and OpenAI co-founder Andrej Karpathy proposed the new paradigm concept of "Software 3.0" in an interview at Sequoia Capital's AI Ascent Summit, stating that even top engineers like himself feel "unprecedentedly behind" in the current AI wave. 近日，AI 研究员、OpenAI 联合创始人安德烈 · 卡帕西（Andrej Karpathy）在红杉资本 AI Ascent 峰会访谈中提出了「软件 3.0」这一新范式概念，并表示即便是他这样的顶尖工程师，也在当前 AI 浪潮中感到「前所未有的落后」。

Karpathy divides software development into three stages: Software 1.0 is explicit code written by humans, Software 2.0 is neural network weights obtained through data training, and Software 3.0 uses large language models (LLMs) as the core computational interpreter, with developers manipulating models through prompt engineering. 卡帕西将软件发展划分为三个阶段：软件 1.0 是人类编写的显式代码，软件 2.0 是通过数据训练得到的神经网络权重，而软件 3.0 则以大语言模型（LLM）作为核心计算解释器，开发者通过提示工程来操控模型。

He likens the context window to "a lever for manipulating the LLM interpreter," believing that the essence of programming is shifting from writing logic to orchestrating and supervising agent clusters. 他将上下文窗口比作「操纵 LLM 这一解释器的杠杆」，认为编程的本质正在从编写逻辑转向编排与监督智能体集群。

He considers last December a personal watershed moment. At that time, he began extensively using AI agent tools for programming and found that code snippets generated by the latest models were "nearly perfect." The establishment of this trust also made him realize that traditional programming skills are undergoing irreversible devaluation. 他将去年 12 月视为个人体验上的分水岭。彼时他开始大量使用 AI 智能体工具进行编程，并发现最新模型生成的代码片段已「近乎完美」。这种信任感的建立，也让他意识到传统编程技能正在经历不可逆的贬值。

However, Karpathy also pointed out that current AI models suffer from a clear problem of "uneven intelligence": large models are extremely capable in clearly verifiable areas like mathematics and code, but still frequently make mistakes in common-sense logic, such as the classic "walking 50 meters to a car wash." 不过，卡帕西同时指出，当前 AI 模型存在明显的「参差不齐的智能」问题：大模型在数学、代码等可被明确验证的领域能力极强，但在常识性逻辑上仍频繁出错，如经典的「步行 50 米去洗车店」。

He believes that developers proficient in agent engineering will see efficiency gains far exceeding the traditional "10x programmer." He also suggested that companies completely restructure their hiring processes, replacing traditional algorithm tests with "assigning large, complete projects and observing how candidates use agent tools to build and defend systems." 他认为，擅长智能体工程的开发者，效率提升将远超传统意义上的「10 倍程序员」。他还建议企业彻底重构招聘流程，以「布置大型完整项目、观察候选人如何调用智能体工具构建并攻防系统」取代传统算法题考核。

Regarding the core value of humans, Karpathy believes that even if AI agents can handle all low-level API details, humans remain an indispensable bottleneck in the system — responsible for controlling architectural aesthetics, logical boundaries, and deciding "what to build" and "why it's worth doing." 而对于人类的核心价值，卡帕西认为，即便 AI 智能体可以处理所有底层 API 细节，人类依然是系统中不可或缺的瓶颈 —— 负责把控架构美学、逻辑边界，以及决定「构建什么」和「为何值得去做」。

item.title: 💡 微软 CEO：与 OpenAI 的新协议对微软「稳赚」
item.guid: 💡-微软-CEO：与-OpenAI-的新协议对微软「稳赚」
item.description:
According to TechCrunch, Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella yesterday made a positive statement during an earnings call regarding the financial impact of Microsoft's revised cooperation agreement with OpenAI. Nadella stated that the new agreement is beneficial for all parties. 据 TechCrunch 报道，微软 CEO 萨提亚 · 纳德拉（Satya Nadella）昨天在财报电话会议上对微软与 OpenAI 修订后的合作协议对公司财务的影响作出正面表态。纳德拉表示，新协议对各方而言均属利好。

We are pleased with our partnership with OpenAI. I have always been very focused on ensuring that any partnership creates a win-win situation, which is a prerequisite for maintaining a good relationship.

He emphasized that under the new agreement, Microsoft retains access to OpenAI's intellectual property until 2032, including its cutting-edge models and AI Agent products, without needing to pay for it anymore. 他强调，微软在新协议下仍保留了对 OpenAI 知识产权的访问权限至 2032 年，包括其前沿模型和 AI Agent 产品，且无需再为此付费。

Nadella was unfazed by OpenAI's previous announcement of an exclusive partnership with Amazon, Microsoft's largest cloud computing competitor. Microsoft's latest quarterly earnings report shows that its AI business's annualized revenue has exceeded $37 billion, a year-over-year increase of 123%. 对于 OpenAI 此前宣布与微软最大的云计算竞争对手亚马逊达成独家合作一事，纳德拉并不以为意。微软最新季度财报显示，其 AI 业务年化收入已突破 370 亿美元，同比增长 123%。

Nadella also pointed out that Microsoft's avenues for deriving revenue from OpenAI extend beyond this. Previously, OpenAI reached an agreement with Microsoft, committing to purchase over $250 billion in Microsoft cloud services; Microsoft also holds a 27% equity stake in OpenAI. 纳德拉还指出，微软从 OpenAI 获取收益的渠道不止于此。此前，OpenAI 与微软达成协议，承诺购买逾 2500 亿美元微软云服务；微软还持有 OpenAI 27% 的股权。

Furthermore, Nadella emphasized that enterprise customers typically prefer to use multiple AI models simultaneously, and OpenAI's relative advantage in the industry, especially in the enterprise market, is no longer as prominent as before. 此外，纳德拉着重强调，企业客户通常倾向于同时使用多个 AI 模型，OpenAI 在行业内、尤其是在企业市场的相对优势已不如以往突出。

We offer the widest range of model choices among all hyperscale cloud providers, allowing customers to select OpenAI, Anthropic, open-source models, and more, depending on different workloads. Currently, over 10,000 customers use more than one model.

item.title: 2.69 万元起，宇树科技发布双臂人形机器人 R1 系列
item.guid: 2.69-万元起，宇树科技发布双臂人形机器人-R1-系列
item.description:
Yesterday, Unitree Robotics officially launched its dual-arm humanoid robot series R1, starting at 26,900 yuan, making it the cheapest known commercial humanoid robot . It emphasizes "ultra-fast deployment and multi-scenario implementation," targeting various application scenarios in industrial, commercial, and other fields. 昨天，宇树科技正式发布双臂人形机器人系列 R1，起售价 2.69 万元，是 目前已知最便宜的商业化人形机器人 ，主打「超快速部署，多场景落地」，面向工业、商业等多类应用场景。

Four models have been launched: R1-A5, R1-A7, R1-A5-D, and R1-A7-D, corresponding to 5-degree-of-freedom and 7-degree-of-freedom single-arm configurations, respectively. Options include a two-finger gripper, a three-finger dexterous hand, or a five-finger dexterous hand, as well as two installation methods: fixed base and mobile chassis. Power supply supports external power or lithium battery, with a battery life of approximately 1.5 hours. 共推出四款型号：R1-A5、R1-A7、R1-A5-D 与 R1-A7-D，分别对应 5 自由度和 7 自由度单臂配置，可选二指夹爪、三指灵巧手或五指灵巧手，以及固定底座与移动底盘两种安装方式，供电支持外部供电或锂电池，电池续航约 1.5 小时。

Taking R1-A5 as an example, the total degrees of freedom for the entire machine is 15, while R1-A7 reaches 19. The single-arm degrees of freedom are 5 and 7 respectively, the waist has 1 degree of freedom, and the head has 2 degrees of freedom. The end effector gripper accuracy reaches ±0.1mm, and the maximum arm load is approximately 2kg. 以 R1-A5 为例，整机总自由度为 15，R1-A7 则达到 19，单臂自由度分别为 5 和 7，腰部自由度 1，头部自由度 2。末端夹爪精度达 ±0.1mm，手臂最大负载约 2kg。

The fixed-base versions (R1-A5/A7) measure 520×440×683mm in retracted state and 520×440×1323mm when extended. The total weight is approximately 11kg (R1-A5) to 13kg (R1-A7), with external power supply. The mobile chassis versions (R1-A5-D/A7-D) weigh approximately 30kg and 32kg, respectively. 固定底座版本（R1-A5/A7）收缩状态下为 520×440×683mm，升起后达 520×440×1323mm，整机重量约 11kg（R1-A5）至 13kg（R1-A7），外部供电。移动底盘版本（R1-A5-D/A7-D）整机重量则分别约 30kg 和 32kg。

This series comes standard with a binocular vision module, and both the body and head are equipped with an 8-core high-performance CPU. The head module additionally provides 10TOPS of computing power, with optional upgrade support to an NVIDIA Jetson Orin high-computing power module, reaching up to 100TOPS. It supports WiFi 6 and Bluetooth 5.2. 该系列标配双目视觉模组，机身与头部均搭载 8 核高性能 CPU，头部模组额外提供 10TOPS 算力，支持选配升级至 NVIDIA Jetson Orin 高算力模组，算力最高可达 100TOPS；支持 WiFi 6 与蓝牙 5.2。

In terms of the development ecosystem, Unitree has opened up interfaces for the underlying system, robotic arm, audio, lighting, and visual control. It supports drag-and-teach programming and provides full-stack secondary development capabilities for developers. 开发生态方面，宇树开放了底层、机械臂、音频、灯光、视觉控制等接口，支持拖动示教，面向开发者提供全栈二次开发能力。

item.title: 阿里发布「数字员工」QoderWake
item.guid: 阿里发布「数字员工」QoderWake
item.description:
Yesterday, Alibaba released two Agent products, the digital employee product QoderWake and the Qoder mobile app, covering enterprise and personal use cases. 昨天，阿里发布数字员工产品 QoderWake 与 Qoder 移动端两款 Agent 产品，覆盖企业和个人使用场景。

QoderWake is positioned as the industry's first secure, controllable, and continuously evolving production-grade digital employee product, capable of taking on specific roles such as software engineer, operations, and analyst in real work environments: QoderWake 定位为业界首个安全可控、持续进化的生产级数字员工产品，能够在真实工作环境中承担软件工程师、运营、分析师等具体岗位角色：

    Adopts an innovative Harness-First architecture. After task execution, the system categorizes and consolidates experience into five dimensions: memory, skills, strategies, verification rules, and workflows, solving the "do and forget" problem of general AI agents;

    Can autonomously execute tasks according to preset rules, automatically trace task trajectories, and proactively review them;

    Can continuously eliminate outdated experience, merge conflicts, and withdraw invalid strategies, ensuring "the more it's used, the more accurate it becomes."

Currently, QoderWake has launched the "Digital Programmer" role and is officially deployed internally at Alibaba. It can autonomously complete tasks such as feedback classification, log analysis, root cause identification, and automatic generation of repair code. The entire process is unattended, with human intervention only for final confirmation in some scenarios. 目前，QoderWake 已上线「数字程序员」角色，并在阿里内部正式上岗，可自主完成反馈分类、日志分析、根因定位和自动生成修复代码等工作，全流程无人值守，人工仅在部分场景做最终确认。

The Qoder mobile app supports users remotely controlling the desktop Qoder to complete tasks. The application can directly display the chain of thought and workflow during interaction with the AI agent, and supports proactive pop-ups and user confirmation of details to enhance the overall user experience. Qoder 移动端则支持用户远程操控桌面端 Qoder 完成任务。该应用可直接展示与 AI 智能体交互过程中的思考链与工作流，并支持主动弹窗和用户确认细节，以提升整体使用体验。

item.title: 英伟达发布全模态模型 Nemotron 3 Nano Omni
item.guid: 英伟达发布全模态模型-Nemotron-3-Nano-Omni
item.description:
Yesterday, NVIDIA released the open-source multimodal model Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, which integrates visual, audio, and language capabilities into a single system, specifically designed for AI agent workflows. 英伟达昨天发布了开放式多模态模型 Nemotron 3 Nano Omni，将视觉、音频与语言能力整合至单一系统，专为 AI 智能体工作流设计。

The model adopts a 30B-A3B Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture, capable of multimodal inference without independent perception models. It achieves 9 times higher throughput than similar open-source full-modality models while maintaining the same interaction performance. Key highlights include: 该模型采用 30B-A3B 混合专家模型（MoE）架构，无需独立感知模型即可完成多模态推理，在保持相同交互性能的前提下，吞吐量比同类开放式全模态模型高 9 倍。核心亮点包括：

    Computer Operation: Supports 1920 x 1080 native input resolution. H Company's computer operation AI agent, based on this model, has made significant progress in OSWorld benchmark tests;

    Document Intelligence: Can parse documents, charts, tables, and mixed media, supporting coherent reasoning of visual structure and text content;

    Audio and Video Understanding: Integrates speech, visuals, and recorded content into a single inference stream, suitable for customer service, research, and monitoring scenarios.

The model is released with open weights, supporting full-scenario deployment from local devices like NVIDIA Jetson and NVIDIA DGX Spark to data centers and cloud environments, and can be used collaboratively with other models in the NVIDIA Nemotron series or third-party proprietary models. 模型以开放权重形式发布，支持从 NVIDIA Jetson、NVIDIA DGX Spark 等本地设备到数据中心和云环境的全场景部署，并可与英伟达 Nemotron 系列其他模型或第三方专有模型协同使用。

item.title: 百灵大模型开源万亿级综合旗舰模型 Ling-2.6-1T
item.guid: 百灵大模型开源万亿级综合旗舰模型-Ling-2.6-1T
item.description:
Yesterday, the Bailing large model officially open-sourced the trillion-parameter comprehensive flagship model Ling-2.6-1T. It is specifically optimized for scenarios such as Agent, Coding, knowledge management, and automated office in real production environments, using more efficient "fast thinking" to reduce output costs at the same level of intelligence. 百灵大模型昨日正式开源万亿级综合旗舰模型 Ling-2.6-1T，面向真实生产环境中的 Agent、Coding、知识管理与自动化办公等场景专门优化，以更高效的「快思考」压缩同等智能水平下的输出成本。

In Artificial Analysis's comprehensive evaluation, Ling-2.6-1T achieved an Intelligence Index of approximately 34 points with about 16M output tokens, entering the highly attractive range, and has demonstrated comparable overall intelligent performance to GPT-4.5 (Non-Reasoning). 在 Artificial Analysis 的综合评测中，Ling-2.6-1T 以约 16M output tokens 达到约 34 分的 Intelligence Index，进入高吸引力区间，已与 GPT-4.5（Non-Reasoning）展现出同档的综合智能表现。

Ling-2.6-1T has also achieved open-source SOTA (State-of-the-Art) levels on several key benchmarks, possessing multi-dimensional capabilities ranging from web and design generation, code development, to written text generation. Ling-2.6-1T 还在多个关键榜单上达到开源 SOTA 水平，具备从网页与设计生成、代码开发到写作文本生成的多维能力。

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/inclusionAI/Ling-2.6-1T 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/inclusionAI/Ling-2.6-1T

👾 ModelScope: modelscope.cn/models/inclusionAI/Ling-2.6-1T 👾 ModelScope: modelscope.cn/models/inclusionAI/Ling-2.6-1T

item.title: 千问开源大模型「透视镜」Qwen-Scope
item.guid: 千问开源大模型「透视镜」Qwen-Scope
item.description:
Yesterday, the Qwen team released and open-sourced the large model interpretability module Qwen-Scope. By inserting Sparse Autoencoders (SAE) into the hidden layers of the Qwen model, it "translates" the complex parameter operations within the model into human-understandable feature concepts, thereby enabling analysis and targeted intervention of model behavior. 昨天，千问团队发布并开源了大模型可解释性模块 Qwen-Scope，通过在 Qwen 模型隐藏层插入稀疏自编码器（SAE），将模型内部复杂的参数运算「翻译」成人类可理解的特征概念，进而实现对模型行为的分析与定向干预。

    Inference Control: Without modifying the prompt, directly manipulating feature activations can change the output language or writing style. For example, disabling "Chinese features" can eliminate the problem of Chinese words being abnormally mixed into English responses, while activating "Classical Chinese features" can switch the continuation style from vernacular to classical Chinese;

    Data Processing: Toxic content classification can be completed with only a small number of seed samples, without the need to train additional classifiers; compared to traditional methods, the training data energy efficiency ratio of targeted synthetic supplementary data is increased by about 15 times;

    Training Optimization: In the supervised fine-tuning phase, by designing a loss function for abnormal activation features, the frequency of low-quality responses such as language mixing can be significantly reduced; in the reinforcement learning phase, by controlling features to increase the sampling probability of low-frequency anomalies such as "repeated generation", model optimization is accelerated;

    Evaluation Redundancy Removal: By calculating the feature activation overlap between different evaluation sets, duplicate evaluation problems are identified. Analysis found that the overlap between GSM8K and MATH is as high as 0.63, and the overlap between MMLU-Pro and SuperGPQA is 0.50, thus raising doubts about the actual reference value of some commonly used evaluation sets.

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/spaces/Qwen/QwenScope?spm=a2ty_o06.30285417.0.0.65e5c921MGq3Tu 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/spaces/Qwen/QwenScope?spm=a2ty_o06.30285417.0.0.65e5c921MGq3Tu

👾 ModelScope: modelscope.cn/studios/Qwen/QwenScope?spm=a2ty_o06.30285417.0.0.65e5c921FZvQi4 👾 ModelScope: modelscope.cn/studios/Qwen/QwenScope?spm=a2ty_o06.30285417.0.0.65e5c921FZvQi4

item.title: 「五一」出行预警：5 月 1 日高速车流或创历史纪录
item.guid: 「五一」出行预警：5-月-1-日高速车流或创历史纪录
item.description:
According to CCTV.com, the Ministry of Transport's National Road Network Center recently released the "National Highway Network Operation Analysis Report for the 'May Day' Holiday," predicting that the overall weather across the country during this year's 'May Day' holiday will be favorable for travel, with an average daily traffic volume of approximately 64 million vehicles on national expressways. 据央视网报道，交通运输部路网中心日前发布《「五一」假期全国公路网运行研判分析报告》，预计今年「五一」假期全国天气总体利于出行，全国高速日均流量约为 6400 万辆。

According to the report's forecast, during the five-day 'May Day' holiday this year, the average daily traffic volume on national expressways will exceed 60 million vehicles, with the peak traffic volume expected on May 1st, reaching 70 million vehicles, setting a new record for single-day traffic during the 'May Day' holiday. National expressways will be toll-free during the holiday. 根据报告预测，今年「五一」假期五天内，全国高速日均车流量均将超过 6000 万辆次，流量峰值将出现在 5 月 1 日，预计达 7000 万辆次，创历年「五一」单日流量新高。假期期间全国高速公路免费通行。

The report also pointed out that holiday congestion will mainly be concentrated in provinces such as Jiangsu, Hubei, Hunan, and Anhui, as well as major expressways like Shenhai, Huyu, and Hurong. Travelers are advised to plan their routes in advance and travel during off-peak hours. 报告同时指出，假期拥堵路段主要集中在江苏、湖北、湖南、安徽等省份，以及沈海、沪渝、沪蓉等高速主干线，建议出行者提前规划路线、错峰出发。

It is also reported that if you accidentally miss your stop, you can promptly inform the train attendant, and the railway department will arrange the next available train to send you back for free. 另据报道，若不小心坐过站，可及时找列车员说明情况，铁路部门会安排最近一趟车免费送回。

item.title: 上海发布首份快递行业劳动规则协议：投诉未经核实不得罚款
item.guid: 上海发布首份快递行业劳动规则协议：投诉未经核实不得罚款
item.description:
According to The Paper, yesterday morning, Shanghai's first "2026 Shanghai Express Delivery Industry Labor Rules Agreement" was officially signed, covering 9 leading platform enterprises in Shanghai, with a total of ten chapters and 47 articles. The main contents cover: 据澎湃新闻报道，昨天上午，上海市首份《2026 年上海市快递行业劳动规则协议》正式签订，覆盖在沪 9 家头部平台企业，共十章 47 条。主要内容覆盖：

    Income Guarantee: For couriers who have worked in Shanghai for a full month, the monthly minimum wage shall not be less than 110% of Shanghai's standard; the direct payment ratio per order shall generally not be less than 25% of the deserved payment;

    Complaint Penalties: Enterprises shall not penalize couriers solely based on user complaints without verification , and shall promote a shift towards positive incentives;

    Labor Protection: Establish a mechanism to stop pickup and delivery during extreme weather and exempt from penalties; enterprises must regularly organize safety training and provide protective equipment;

    Right to Rest: Ensure couriers' right to regular rest through methods such as rotation, compensatory leave, and annual leave;

    Anti-Involution Clause: Prohibit member units from engaging in improper competitive behaviors such as below-cost pickup and inverted subsidies.

item.title: 星巴克 ×《只此青绿》打造端午限定体验
item.guid: 星巴克-×《只此青绿》打造端午限定体验
item.description:
Yesterday, Starbucks China announced a cross-industry collaboration with the dance poetry drama "Poetic Dance: The Journey of a Legendary Landscape Painting" (只此青绿), integrating the oriental aesthetic of "A Thousand Li of Rivers and Mountains" into products, spaces, and immersive experiences through three dimensions: "color, form, and meaning." 昨天，星巴克中国宣布与舞蹈诗剧《只此青绿》达成跨界联名，以「色、形、意」三重维度将《千里江山图》的东方意境融入产品、空间与沉浸式体验。

Regarding core products, the 2026 Starbucks Zongzi collection will be fully refreshed with the "Poetic Dance: The Journey of a Legendary Landscape Painting" theme, introducing four flavors: Rose Hawthorn, Taro Mochi, Iced Coconut Jelly, and Mung Bean with Fermented Rice. The packaging will feature a three-dimensional scroll-style gift box for the first time, unfolding a classic segment of "A Thousand Li of Rivers and Mountains" upon opening. 核心产品方面，2026 年星冰粽全面以《只此青绿》为主题焕新，推出玫瑰山楂、芋泥麻薯、冰沁冻椰椰、绿豆浸酒酿四款风味。包装首次采用立体展卷式礼盒，拆盒即展开《千里江山图》经典片段。

At the offline experience level, Starbucks will upgrade its selected Hangzhou Hefang Street Intangible Cultural Heritage concept store into a "Poetic Dance: The Journey of a Legendary Landscape Painting" themed highlight store, grandly presenting the "Into the Painting: A Thousand Li of Rivers and Mountains Green Rhyme Special Exhibition," fully showcasing the seven major chapters of the dance drama: Unrolling the Scroll, Inquiring about Seals, Singing Silk, Searching for Stones, Practicing Calligraphy, Tempering Ink, and Entering the Painting. 线下体验层面，星巴克将臻选杭州河坊街非遗概念店升级为《只此青绿》主题高光店，重磅呈现「入画千里江山绿韵特展」，完整展现舞剧展卷、问篆、唱丝、寻石、习笔、淬墨、入画七大篇章。

item.title: 喜剧电影《三心两意》今日上映
item.guid: 喜剧电影《三心两意》今日上映
item.description:
The May Day holiday comedy film "Three Hearts, Two Minds" (三心两意) officially premieres today. 五一档喜剧电影《三心两意》今日正式上映。

The film tells the story of protagonist Jiang Ruilin discovering her husband Luo Bin's special relationship with Yu Xiaoyu. After saving Yu Xiaoyu, who attempted suicide, the two form a partnership and jointly launch a series of plans to "deal with scumbags," presenting a main storyline of female mutual aid and counterattack through comedic techniques. 影片讲述女主角江芮琳发现丈夫罗斌与余小鱼存在特殊关系，在救下试图轻生的余小鱼后，两人结成合作关系，共同展开一系列整治「渣男」的计划，以喜剧手法呈现女性互助与反击的故事主线。

item.title: 经典惊悚片《大白鲨》定档 5 月 15 日
item.guid: 经典惊悚片《大白鲨》定档-5-月-15-日
item.description:
The classic thriller "Jaws" was officially announced yesterday to be released on May 15th. Directed by Steven Spielberg, the film has a Douban rating of 7.8 and tells the story of Amity Island, a resort town, plunged into panic by a series of great white shark attacks. Sheriff Brody, fisherman Quint, and biologist Hooper team up to go out to sea and engage in a life-and-death struggle. 经典惊悚片《大白鲨》昨日官宣定档 5 月 15 日。影片由史蒂文·斯皮尔伯格执导，豆瓣评分 7.8，讲述度假胜地艾米蒂岛因大白鲨连环袭击陷入恐慌，警长布罗迪、捕鱼手昆特与生物学家胡珀三人联手出海展开生死较量的故事。

The film premiered in the United States in June 1975, when Spielberg was only 28 years old. After its release, "Jaws" set the highest global box office record at the time, with a cumulative box office of 400 million US dollars, and thus pioneered the concept of Hollywood "summer blockbusters," being regarded by film history as the origin of summer commercial blockbusters. 影片于 1975 年 6 月在美国首映，彼时斯皮尔伯格年仅 28 岁。《大白鲨》上映后创下当时全球最高票房纪录，累计票房达 4 亿美元，并由此开创了好莱坞「暑期档大片」这一概念，被影史视为暑期商业大片的起源。

item.title: 《宇宙巨人：希曼崛起》官宣引进
item.guid: 《宇宙巨人：希曼崛起》官宣引进
item.description:
The fantasy epic "Masters of the Universe: Revolution" was officially announced yesterday to be introduced to mainland China, with its North American release set for June 5th, and the mainland release date yet to be determined. 奇幻史诗巨制《宇宙巨人：希曼崛起》昨日官宣引进内地，北美定档 6 月 5 日上映，内地档期待定。

The film is adapted from the classic animated IP of the same name from the 80s. The story tells of Adam, an "office worker" living an ordinary life on Earth, who, after finding the Sword of Power, returns to Eternia, only to find his homeland ravaged and controlled by Skeletor's dark forces. 影片改编自 80 年代同名经典动画 IP，故事讲述原本在地球过着平凡生活的「社畜」亚当，寻得神剑后得以回归埃坦尼亚大陆，却发现故土已被骷髅王的黑暗势力掌控、满目疮痍。

To protect his home, he once again grasps the Sword of Power, shouting the classic slogan that echoed in the memories of a generation — "Grant me strength! I am He-Man!" — thus beginning an epic showdown. 为守护家园，他再度握起力量神剑，高喊那句响彻一代人记忆的经典口号 ——「赐予我力量吧！我是希曼！」，由此展开一场史诗级对决。
